case_title: GORMAN, RHONDA LEE vs. BETTA OF NY INC. DBA ANDREA CARRANO SHOES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GORMAN, RHONDA LEE AS TO DEFENDANT BETTA OF NY INC. DBA ANDREA CARRANO SHOES
